_readme: Reference scenes from image-prompt-library.json using 'scene' field.
Set 'type' to 'hero' or 'break' to pick the right variant from the library.
Override with a custom 'prompt' if a scene does not fit - library scene is ignored when prompt is set.
Override 'altText' to customise the image alt text for SEO.
Run: Actions > Generate Site Images (manual trigger) after editing.
To regenerate one image: remove its r2Key from image-manifest.json, re-run workflow.
DO NOT change 'key' values - they are referenced by index.astro.
No emoji or special characters in this file.

images.altText: Professional using document software in a modern Australian office
Professional software setup with laptop and headset on a clean desk

_newSiteChecklist: WHEN CLONING TO A NEW SITE:
1. Pick scenes from _availableScenes that match your product and audience.
2. Update 'scene' values for hero, feat1, feat2.
3. Update 'altText' values to describe what the images show for this site.
4. For a custom prompt not in the library, add a 'prompt' field and omit 'scene'.
5. Clear any r2Key entries from image-manifest.json carried over from master.
Dragon / speech recognition sites: hero=doctor-surgery, feat1=clinic-desk, feat2=microphone-closeup
PDF / document sites: hero=office-general, feat1=pdf-workflow, feat2=box-shot
Dictation hardware sites: hero=hospital-office, feat1=microphone-closeup, feat2=medical-admin
Student / education sites: hero=student-study, feat1=office-general, feat2=box-shot
